title: /login lacks <Container>+<PageHeader> chrome
evidence: Page renders content inside <AppShell> but does not use the canonical <Container> + <PageHeader> wrappers; layout is hand-rolled.
recommendation: Wrap content in <Container><PageHeader title="Sign in" description=... />...</Container>.

title: /offline lacks chrome wrappers
evidence: No Container/PageHeader; renders raw section markup.
recommendation: Add <Container><PageHeader title="Offline drafts" /></Container>.

title: /copilot lacks chrome wrappers
evidence: No Container or PageHeader.
recommendation: Wrap in canonical chrome.

title: /pair lacks chrome wrappers
evidence: Hand-rolled pairing UI without chrome.
recommendation: Wrap in canonical chrome.

title: /marketplace lacks chrome wrappers
evidence: List page without PageHeader.
recommendation: Add Container+PageHeader and a primary 'New' action slot.

title: /governance lacks chrome wrappers
evidence: No Container/PageHeader.
recommendation: Wrap and clarify route purpose vs /admin/governance.

title: /prompts lacks chrome wrappers
evidence: No Container/PageHeader; hand-rolled tabs.
recommendation: Wrap in chrome and use a shared <Tabs> primitive.

title: /terminology lacks chrome wrappers
evidence: No PageHeader; hand-rolled tabs that differ from /prompts.
recommendation: Add chrome and migrate tabs to a shared primitive.

title: /reports duplicates / without PageHeader
evidence:
Duplicates the reports list at /; uses
Loading…
instead of .
recommendation: Pick one canonical route (delete the other) and adopt chrome + Skeleton.

title: /reports/view lacks chrome
evidence: Detail surface imports ReportClient without PageHeader.
recommendation: Wrap header in <PageHeader> with report id + status badge.

title: /rulebooks/view lacks chrome
evidence: No PageHeader.
recommendation: Add chrome wrapping RulebookDetailClient.

title: /rulebooks/editor lacks chrome
evidence: Editor uses ad-hoc split layout without canonical chrome.
recommendation: Use Container fluid + PageHeader; consolidate split into shared editor shell.

title: /audit lacks chrome
evidence: No PageHeader; table sits directly under topbar.
recommendation: Add chrome and table scroll wrapper.

title: /audit/verify lacks chrome and is not in sidebar
evidence: No chrome; compliance-relevant page hidden from IA.
recommendation: Add chrome and surface in sidebar under Workspace › Audit.

title: /analytics lacks chrome
evidence: No PageHeader.
recommendation: Add chrome and chart skeletons.

title: /analytics/quality lacks chrome and not in sidebar
evidence: No chrome; 22 inline-style violations.
recommendation: Add chrome, refactor inline styles, link from sidebar.

title: /mobile/dictate lacks chrome
evidence: Mobile surface without canonical chrome.
recommendation: Add mobile-tailored chrome variant.

title: /mobile/reports/edit lacks chrome
evidence: No PageHeader.
recommendation: Add chrome.

title: /mobile/reports/sign lacks chrome AND confirmation
evidence: Sign action is irreversible but surface lacks PageHeader and designed ConfirmDialog.
recommendation: Add chrome AND a designed confirmation step; surface audit trail inline.

title: /admin/billing lacks chrome
evidence: No PageHeader.
recommendation: Add chrome.

title: /admin/copilot lacks chrome and not in sidebar
evidence: No PageHeader; hidden from IA.
recommendation: Add chrome and sidebar entry under Admin.

title: /admin/feature-flags lacks chrome
evidence: No PageHeader.
recommendation: Add chrome.

title: /admin/fhir-import lacks chrome
evidence: No PageHeader; upload affordance is ad-hoc.
recommendation: Add chrome and a designed upload primitive.

title: /admin/governance vs /governance route collision
evidence: Two routes with similar names but different audiences.
recommendation: Rename one or merge under /governance with role-based view.

title: /admin/mcp lacks chrome and not in sidebar
evidence: Hand-rolled UI; uses window.confirm and window.prompt.
recommendation: Replace with chrome + ConfirmDialog + Prompt primitive.

title: /admin/security lacks chrome
evidence: No PageHeader.
recommendation: Add chrome.

title: /admin/sso lacks chrome and not in sidebar (security-critical)
evidence: Security-critical SSO config invisible from IA; reachable only by URL.
recommendation: Add chrome and surface under Admin › Security in sidebar.

title: window.confirm() for report signing
evidence: Sign action (irreversible) uses native browser confirm.
recommendation: Introduce <ConfirmDialog> primitive; require typed confirmation for sign.

title: window.confirm()+prompt() for MCP connector management
evidence: Add/remove connector flows use native dialogs.
recommendation: Replace with ConfirmDialog and Prompt primitives.

title: window.confirm()+prompt() for validation packs
evidence: Install/delete flows use native dialogs.
recommendation: Replace with designed primitives.

title: window.confirm() for provider OAuth credential rotation
evidence: Credential rotation guarded only by browser confirm.
recommendation: ConfirmDialog with explicit consequence text + audit-trail link.

title: window.prompt() for naming new prompts
evidence: Create-prompt flow uses window.prompt().
recommendation: Replace with inline form or designed naming modal.

title: 18 routes missing from sidebar IA
evidence: Only 20 of 37 routes appear in the sidebar. Hidden: copilot, pair, governance, audit/verify, analytics/quality, mobile/*, admin/copilot, admin/mcp, admin/sso, plus detail views.
recommendation: Audit IA; promote admin/sso, audit/verify, admin/copilot, admin/mcp to sidebar; document intentional exclusions.

title: Detail routes use query strings instead of [id] dynamic segments
evidence: [id]/ folders exist but hold client components; routing uses ?id=. Inconsistent with App Router conventions.
recommendation: Migrate to /[id]/page.tsx dynamic segments and move client components there.

title: /reports duplicates / landing
evidence: Two routes render reports list. Sidebar matches both via /reports* prefix.
recommendation: Pick a canonical route and redirect the other.

title: Duplicate selector .rp-container in radiopad.css and shell.css
evidence: Same selector defined in two stylesheets; last-loaded wins.
recommendation: Delete the duplicate from radiopad.css; shell.css is the canonical source.

title: Duplicate selector .rp-page-title
evidence: Duplicate rule in two stylesheets.
recommendation: Delete from radiopad.css.

title: Duplicate selector .rp-page-sub
evidence: Duplicate rule.
recommendation: Delete from radiopad.css.

title: .panel vs .rp-panel class ambiguity
evidence: Two near-synonym classes for the same surface treatment.
recommendation: Pick .rp-panel as canonical and codemod .panel usages.

title: Missing spacing token scale
evidence: No --space-1..--space-8 tokens; magic numbers (4/6/8/12/16/24) scattered.
recommendation: Add 4px-based spacing scale and document in design.md.

title: Missing typography scale tokens
evidence: No --text-xs/sm/base/lg/xl scale tokens.
recommendation: Define typography scale; map .rp-* classes onto tokens.

title: Missing breakpoint tokens
evidence: Media queries use ad-hoc values (640/768/900/1024).
recommendation: Add --bp-sm/md/lg/xl tokens and use them in all media queries.

title: Missing z-index scale tokens
evidence: No z-index scale; stacking is ad-hoc.
recommendation: Define --z-base/dropdown/sticky/modal/toast.

title: 31 page files contain inline style={{...}} (design-lock violation)
evidence: Verified by grep across frontend; design lock forbids inline styles.
recommendation: Add ESLint react/forbid-dom-props rule for 'style'; migrate to tokens/classes.

title: No <Modal> primitive
evidence: No shared modal component; pages reinvent or use browser dialogs.
recommendation: Build accessible <Modal> with focus trap and Esc handling.

title: No <Tabs> primitive
evidence: Hand-rolled tabs in /prompts and /terminology differ.
recommendation: Build WAI-ARIA tabs primitive.

title: No <Toast> / success-feedback primitive
evidence: Success states are silent or share banners with errors.
recommendation: Build <Toast> with role=status/alert and aria-live regions.

title: No <ConfirmDialog> primitive
evidence: 5 destructive flows fall back to window.confirm().
recommendation: Build <ConfirmDialog> with consequence text + typed-confirmation variant for irreversible actions.

title: No <FormField> primitive
evidence: Form inputs are wired ad-hoc; labels and error text inconsistent.
recommendation: Build <FormField label hint error /> wrapping input.

title: pnpm wrapper bug breaks typecheck/build
evidence: pnpm runDepsStatusCheck re-runs install which exits 1 due to ERR_PNPM_IGNORED_BUILDS for esbuild/sharp.
recommendation: Either approve builds with `pnpm approve-builds`, set onlyBuiltDependencies in package.json, or add scripts that call ./node_modules/.bin/tsc and next directly.

title: Sidebar nav items touch targets <44x44
evidence: Computed line-height/padding produce <44px hit area.
recommendation: Increase min-height to 44px; preserve visual density via padding tokens.

title: Missing app/not-found.tsx, error.tsx, loading.tsx
evidence: No route-level error/not-found/loading files; relies on per-page handling.
recommendation: Add canonical app-level fallbacks rendering via design system.

title: No ESLint design-lock rule
evidence: Inline-style ban and class-allowlist are documented but unenforced.
recommendation: Add eslint-plugin-react no-inline-styles + custom rule referencing approved class allowlist.

title: No Stylelint
evidence: Stylesheets receive no automated lint.
recommendation: Add Stylelint with rules: no-duplicate-selectors, declaration-property-value-allowed-list for colors/spacing.

title: No Storybook / component tests / visual regression
evidence: No component-level test surface.
recommendation: Add Storybook + Vitest + Playwright + Percy/Chromatic.

title: No skip link in Topbar
evidence: Keyboard users cannot bypass sidebar/topbar to reach main content.
recommendation: Add visually-hidden 'Skip to main content' link as first focusable element.

title: ProfileMenu popover has no focus trap
evidence: Popover opens but focus is not trapped; Tab escapes the menu.
recommendation: Trap focus while open; return focus to trigger on close; close on Esc.

title: Mobile drawer doesn't trap focus or return on close
evidence: Drawer aria-hidden toggled but focus management unverified.
recommendation: Trap focus while open; restore focus to menu button on close.

title: DictateButton hard-codes lang='en-US'
evidence: Speech recognition uses fixed en-US regardless of negotiated locale.
recommendation: Read locale from next-intl context; map to BCP-47 tag.

title: EmptyState lacks aria-live
evidence: Has role='status' but no aria-live='polite'; not announced.
recommendation: Add aria-live='polite'.

title: BillingStatusBanner severity inconsistency
evidence: suspended uses role='alert', grace uses role='status'.
recommendation: Both states are user-blocking; use role='alert' for both.

title: LocalePicker triggers window.location.reload()
evidence: Full page reload destroys form state and disorients AT users.
recommendation: Apply locale via next-intl router; revalidate; preserve focus.

title: ErrorState defaults hard-coded English
evidence: Default title/retry strings bypass next-intl.
recommendation: Translate via next-intl message catalogue.

title: Color-only severity on badges
evidence: Status is conveyed by color alone.
recommendation: Add icon or text-prefix (e.g. •, ✓, ⚠, ✕) per severity.

title: Tables lack <caption> and <th scope>
evidence: Tables rendered without semantic header associations.
recommendation: Add <caption> and scope='col'/'row' to all data tables.

title: Date inputs lack explicit <label htmlFor>
evidence: Several date inputs use placeholder-only labelling.
recommendation: Add <label htmlFor> for every form control.

title: Focus-visible not audited on button variants
evidence: Visual focus rings on .primary/.ghost/.subtle not verified across browsers.
recommendation: Add :focus-visible rules using --accent and 3:1 contrast.

title: Sidebar uses <a> without semantic <nav>
evidence: Nav landmark semantics not verified.
recommendation: Ensure primary navigation is wrapped in <nav aria-label='Primary'>.

title: PageHeader actions don't wrap below 480px
evidence: Action row uses flex without wrap; overflows on narrow viewports.
recommendation: Add flex-wrap and gap; stack at <480px.

title: Long tables lack horizontal scroll wrapper
evidence: Tables overflow viewport at 320–480px widths.
recommendation: Wrap each <table> in a div with overflow-x:auto; add aria-label.

title: ErrorState defaults bypass i18n
evidence: Hard-coded 'Something went wrong' / 'Retry'.
recommendation: Move to next-intl catalogue.

title: Login token explanation is wordy and technical
evidence: Multi-paragraph explanation of magic-link mechanics on the login page.
recommendation: Reduce to one helper sentence + 'Learn more' link.

title: Backend enum names exposed in /admin/security
evidence: Strings like 'rotationPolicy', 'before_expiry', 'ProviderComplianceClass' surface directly.
recommendation: Map enum values to human-friendly labels in lib/copy.ts.

title: Raw exception messages leak from API errors
evidence: Errors rendered as raw exception .message strings.
recommendation: Map known error codes to user copy; show 'Try again' affordance; log full error.

title: Success states are silent
evidence: Save/update actions produce no visible confirmation.
recommendation: Introduce <Toast> primitive and add success copy strings to catalogue.

title: Empty-state copy missing on most data pages
evidence: Pages render blank panels for empty data.
recommendation: Centralise empty-state copy in messages catalogue; one per surface.

title: Inconsistent voice across CTAs
evidence: Mixes imperative ('Sign report') and descriptive ('Report signed') without rules.
recommendation: Adopt voice guide: imperative for actions, descriptive for state.

title: Validation severities use color words only
evidence: Severity labelled by color treatment without explicit Blocker/Warning/Info text in some chips.
recommendation: Always show severity word alongside color.

title: Login → tenant context: no post-login redirect to `?return=`
evidence: ?return= query param not honoured on successful login.
recommendation: Read and validate ?return= and redirect after sign-in.

title: Draft → validate → sign: no global progress indicator
evidence: User cannot see where they are in the lifecycle.
recommendation: Add a status stepper in PageHeader actions slot.

title: AI-marked text has no documented acknowledge gesture
evidence: .ai-mark wears purple until reviewed but the 'review' contract is undefined.
recommendation: Define an Acknowledge action (click chip / Alt+A) and remove .ai-mark on commit.

title: No undo for destructive admin actions
evidence: Delete actions are immediate with no undo affordance.
recommendation: Add toast-based undo window (5s) for non-irreversible deletes.

title: Locale change reloads full page
evidence: window.location.reload() destroys form state and breaks focus.
recommendation: Use next-intl router refresh; preserve form state.

title: Skeleton uses inline style attribute
evidence: Single inline style attribute used for sizing.
recommendation: Move sizing to CSS variables exposed via class modifiers.

title: ProfileMenu inline style
evidence: Inline padding style.
recommendation: Move to class.

title: Breadcrumbs inline style
evidence: Inline flex style.
recommendation: Move to class.

title: PageActionsSlot accepts any children
evidence: No type constraint; pages can inject arbitrary markup.
recommendation: Constrain to ReactElement<typeof Button> | array of same.

title: Inconsistent breakpoints across stylesheets
evidence: Media queries use 640/768/900/1024 inconsistently.
recommendation: Adopt --bp-sm/md/lg/xl tokens and unify.

title: Sidebar drawer breakpoint differs from PageHeader breakpoint
evidence: Drawer flips at 900px but PageHeader stacks at a different threshold.
recommendation: Unify on documented breakpoint tokens.

title: .rp-container padding too wide on 320px
evidence: Padding fixed; eats >50% of narrow viewports.
recommendation: Reduce horizontal padding below --bp-sm.

title: No live screenshots captured
evidence: Backend not running in audit env; static export prevents data-driven captures.
recommendation: Run capture protocol in 11-screenshot-index.md as follow-up.
